rationale: Review 1 correctly identifies that `@[simp]` on `includeRight_apply` (proof `rfl`) causes simp to eagerly unfold `includeRight` before the four characteristic lemmas (`counit_includeRight`, `comul_includeRight`, `antipode_includeRight`, `map_includeRight`) can fire, making them dead simp lemmas — all four are confirmed in the diff with `includeRight` as a subterm of their LHS. Acting on Review 1's fix (drop `@[simp]` from `includeRight_apply`) produces a coherent simp API; Review 2 misses the issue entirely.
